resources.string: "The hybrid log–gamma transfer function is a transfer function jointly developed by the BBC and NHK for high dynamic range display. It is backward compatible with the transfer function of SDR."
Dolby Vision is an advanced HDR format, using dynamic metadata to improve the image frame by frame.
HDR10 is the most common, open HDR standard. It uses static metadata, which means that the brightness settings are determined once for the whole video.
HDR10+ is an advancement of HDR10 which adds, like Dolby Vision, dynamic metadata to enhance a scene or a frame.
This app uses the HdrSdrRatio to check your display\'s HDR status. Tap below to learn more.
